modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questions about USD account creation for dual credit students.

full_description_text: Users are inquiring about the creation of USD accounts. They want to know if dual credit students receive a USD email address when taking courses. Clarification is needed on the process for students from NSU.
short_description: Questions about USD account creation for dual credit students.
description: Users are inquiring about the creation of USD accounts. They want to know if dual credit students receive a USD email address when taking courses. Clarification is needed on the process for students from NSU.
